sections.sectionTitle: Deborah leh Barak in Sisera Zo

verses.text: Ehud a sih khit ciangin Topa' muhna-ah Israel mite a sia gamta kik uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Hazor-ah a uk, Kanaan kumpipa Jabin' khutsungah amaute a pia hi. Ama galkapte a ukpa pen, Harosheth-ha-goiim-ah a teng Sisera ahi hi
Tua ciangin Israel mite huhna a ngen dingin Topa' tungah a kiko uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amah in sik leeng za kua nei a, Israel mite kum sawmnih sung nakpi takin gim a pia hi
Tua hun lai-in Lappidoth' zi kamsang numei Deborah in Israel-te thu khen hi
Tuanu, Efraim mualtung gamsung Ramah leh Bethel kikal nisuhkung nuai-ah tu zel a, thu a khensak dingin ama kiangah Israel mite hong pai uh hi

Amah in mi sawlin Naftali gam Kedesh panin Abinoam' tapa Barak samsakin ama kiangah, “ Topa, Israel-te' Pasian in nang thu hong pia-in, ‘Pai in, Tabor Mual-ah na mite khawm in la, Naftali minam leh Zebulun minam panin mi tul sawm bang la in hong ci hilo ahi hiam
Keimah in Jabin' galkapmang Sisera, Kishon gunah nang hong dawntuah dingin a leengte leh a galkapte tawh ka kaikhia ding a, na khutsungah amah kong pia ding hi,’ hong ci hi,” a ci hi
Barak in ama kiangah, “Kei na hong zuih ding leh, ka kuan ding hi. Ahih hangin kei tawh nong kuan kei ding leh, ka kuan kei ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin amah in, “Nang tawh kong kuan taktak ding hi. Ahi zongin gualzawhna pen nangma min than'na ding hilo ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in numei khat' khutsungah Sisera pia ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Deborah dingin Barak tawh Kedesh-ah pai hi
Barak in Kedesh-ah Zebulun minam leh Naftali minamte a sam hi. Ama kiangah mihing tul sawm bang kuanto uh a, amah tawh Deborah kuanto khawm hi
Tu-in Moses' zi' sanggampa Hobab' suanlekhak Ken mite sung panin Ken mi Heber paikhia a, Kedesh kianga Zaanannim-a tawsaw ciang pekah a puanbuk a lam hi
Abinoam' tapa Barak, Tabor Mual-ah paito khin, ci-in Sisera kiangah a kigen ciangin
Sisera in a leeng khempeuh, sik leeng za kua, leh ama kianga om mi khempeuh, Harosheth-ha-goiim panin Kishon gunah a samkhia hi

Tua ciangin Deborah in Barak kiangah, “Pai in! Bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in na khutsungah Sisera hong piak ni ahi hi. Na mai-ah Topa pai hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin mihing tul sawm bang in zui-in Tabor Mual panin Barak a paisuk hi
Topa in Barak' mai-ah Sisera leh a leengte khempeuh a taisak hi. Tua ciangin Sisera a leeng tung pan tuakin a khe-in a tai hi
Barak in Harosheth-ha-goiim ciangdong a leengte leh a galkapte delh a, Sisera' galkapte khempeuh namsau tawh kithatin beimang uh a, mi khat zong suaktalo hi
Ahih hangin Sisera, Ken mi Heber' zi Jael' puanbukah a khe-in a tai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh Hazor kumpipa Jabin leh Ken mi Heber' innkuante kilem uh hi

Sisera a dawn dingin Jael hong pusuakin ama kiangah, “Hong kihei in, ka topa aw, kei lamah hong kihei in; lau kei in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin ama puanbukah Sisera hong pai a, tuanu in sualphah puan khat tawh amah na khuh hi

Amah in tuanu kiangah, “Hong thum ing, dawn ding tui hong pia in; bang hang hiam cih leh ka dangtak hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amah in bawngnawi koihna savun thawl hongin dawnsakin amah a khuhkik hi
Amah in tuanu kiangah, “Puanbuk kongah ding in la, mi khatpeuh hong pai-in na kiangah, ‘Hih lai-ah mi khatpeuh a om hiam?’ hong cih leh, ‘Om kei,’ na ci in,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin Heber' zi Jael in puanbuk khetphim khat la a, a khutah sek khat tawi-in ama kiangah damtakin pai a, a gimluatna hangin ihmucipin a om laitakin a khetphim in lei a bat dongin a paangah a khensuk hi. Tua ciangin Sisera a si hi

En in, Barak in Sisera hong delh ciangin amah a dawn dingin Jael hong pusuakin ama kiangah, “Hong pai in, na mi zon' kong lak ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tuanu' puanbuk sungah amah hong pai hi. Tua lai-ah Sisera a paangah puanbuk khetphim tawh a si-in na om hi
Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Israel mite' mai-ah Pasian in Kanaan kumpi Jabin nuaisiah hi
Israel mite in Kanaan kumpipa Jabin a suksiat matengin Kanaan kumpipa Jabin tungah thuak hak semsem uh hi.
